overview: Hidden Strings is a five-color Pioneer control deck that leverages early removal, land acceleration, and board-clearing value spells to outlast opponents. By stabilizing with Fatal Push and untapping lands via Lotus Field, the deck transitions into a late-game grind where Vibrance provides both board control and massive card advantage. The strategy focuses on maintaining tempo while systematically depleting the opponent's resources.
win_conditions: Outdraw and outvalue opponents through Vibrance card draw
Stabilize early with Fatal Push and race with midrange threats
Use Lotus Field to accelerate into late-game finishers and sweepers

keep_criteria: Hands with Fatal Push and two lands
Low-cost threats that can race early
Hands containing Lotus Field for mana acceleration
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking removal or early interaction
Hands with three or more lands and no spells
Hands missing Fatal Push against aggressive matchups

early_game: Play lands efficiently and hold Fatal Push for instant-speed answers
Prioritize removing power 2 or less threats to stabilize
Use Lotus Field cautiously to avoid mana screw while setting up acceleration
mid_game: Develop board presence with resilient creatures
Sacrifice Lotus Field to untap lands for key spells or sweepers
Begin drawing into late-game resources while maintaining board control
late_game: Cast Vibrance to clear opponent's board and draw into finishers
Leverage card advantage to outlast opponent's resources
Close out games with large threats or repeated board clears

key_cards.name: Lotus Field
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice to untap lands for big spells; manage tapped entry carefully to avoid mana shortages

key_cards.name: Vibrance
key_cards.role: Board clear and card draw engine
key_cards.notes: Hold for opponent's big turns; synergizes with +1/+1 counter creatures if present

key_cards.name: Fatal Push
key_cards.notes: Use on power 2 or less threats to stabilize; prioritize opponent's aggressive creatures

sequencing_tips: Hold Fatal Push for instant speed to counter aggressive pushes
Time Lotus Field sacrifices to ensure you have enough untapped mana for key spells
Cast Vibrance after opponent commits resources to the board to maximize card draw and board state swing

matchups.advice: Prioritize Fatal Push on their biggest threats; use Lotus Field to untap lands for early interaction
Race with midrange threats; use Vibrance to clear their board and draw into answers
Disrupt early setup with Fatal Push; use Lotus Field to accelerate into answers

common_threats: Aggressive creatures with power 2 or less
